feed.title: SAP Community - Data and Analytics
feed.subtitle: Data and Analytics Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Fetch total vol of email and ticket attachments from C4C
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

Is anyone aware on how to get total vol of email and ticket attachments from C4C as odata ServiceRequestAttachmentFolderCollection

and EmailAttachmentCollection doesnot support count or other functions without using dependent ids?

Your guidance is much appreciated.

entry.title: Creating/Changing material view Sales: General/Plant Data using BAPI MATERIAL_SAVEDATA
entry.content:
I want to create/change material using BAPI MATERIAL_SAVEDATA/any other BAPI then suggest. As per the requirement we just want to maintain the Sales: General/Plant Data among the Sales views. This is a part of the Plant Data i.e.MARC table which is set to Active in the BAPI.

I pass on the fields of the view Sales: General/Plant Data but this view is not generated when the material master is created.

I cannot use the below mentioned sales data fields of the BAPI as it activates the other sales views which I do not want.

  1. SALESDATA = BAPI_SALESDATA
  2. SALESDATAX = BAPI_SALESDATAX

Is there any way to achieve this?

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: SAC Model calculations - YoY (function) and MoM/WoW/DoD
entry.content:
How can I create a model calculation for YOY, MoM,WoW,DoD .

my model has sales [measure] per day [Date dimension].

I saw the YOY built in function but thought maybe someone used that Iterate function to build the same for the rest of the granularities.

MoM = (Current Month - Prev. month ) / Prev. month

same for week and day.

entry.title: Documentation on SAC Models
entry.content:
Hello:

Is there a way to get a report on all the models in SAC in the public folder (Model name, its dimensions, measures, if Data access is enabled, etc.). I can go open each model but thats not what I am looking for.

Thank you so much in advance!

entry.title: Change or Customize SAC Default Home Screen based on SAC teams?
entry.content:
Hi everyone

Is it possible to initially start SAC with my own HTML page (Like an intranet page) or highly customize the Home Screen (like in a story)?

if not, would it be possible that when a specific SAC Team starts SAC, a certian Diagrams/Numeric points will already be pinned to the Home screen according to my customization? (And other SAC Teams would see different pinned Diagrams)

I am aware of the Administration settings for the Default Appearance to change the Logo and add or remove tiles, but what I am searching for is either customizing the Home screen according to specific teams or adding my own Home Screen.

I appreciate any suggestions or ideas that could bring me to the solution.


Kind regards,
Feras

entry.title: automatically sequence in the Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi All,

Initially had line items 10, 20, 30, and 40, and if you delete line item 30, the system will not automatically sequence to 10, 20, 30. Instead, it will retain the original numbering, resulting in 10, 20, 40. in sap please suggest

Thanks and regards,

Pankaj Kumar

entry.title: Linked Analysis not working
entry.content: Hi! I have a situation where in Story report I have a page with Numeric Point Chart and near a Table ; I tried to link them but nothing is happening. They have same database and I also tried with and without ,,Filter on data point selection". Also no error 😐

entry.title: How to build a simple intend based Navigation on a custom CDS Analytical Query to a Fiori App
entry.content:
Hi,

got a custom very simple ACDOCA analytical Query, ZZ1_ACDOCA,  with document number
and want  to navigate from the query result with the document number
to the App "Manage Journal Entries"  - Thats it.

 

I am desperate about the many semantic object- intentd blogs - none hits the issue  or is complete.
How is this done ?
How to set up the navigation and the Semantic Object, Step by Step ?

Other live example: Query:C_PurOrdAvgDelivTime - Purchase Order Average Delivery Time
Navigation: 

How is this where done ?

Thank You !

Best !
Martin

======================================================
@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName : 'ZZ1V_ACDOCA'
@EndUserText.label:               'ACDOCA Simple Query'
define view ZZ1_ACDOCA as select from ZCACDOCA
{
wsl,
belnr
}
@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZACDOCA'
@EndUserText.label: 'ACDOCA Simple Cube'
@analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE
define view ZCACDOCA
as select from acdoca as _ACDOCA
{
key belnr ,
@DefaultAggregation: #SUM
wsl
}

entry.title: SAP B1 on Hana - Dirty Read - Service Layer Analytical view
entry.content:
Hi guys, we have the following scenario:

- We create a Analytical view and expose it on service layer.

- The view exposed is used by a third party app to read the jornals entries.

We detect than the view exposes non commited journal lines . It means than, if you consume the endpoint during a database transaction (posting a large jornal for example), some journals can are present unbalanced (some lines are not showen).

We test this scenario over an UDT, and we found the same behavior.

Could someone tell me how to avoid dirty reading in a view (or analytical view) HANA 2.0?

Regards,

 

Gustavo

entry.title: How to find new products sold every month?
entry.content:
Hi, I would line to create a table that counts the number of new products sold in every month.

assuming I have the following dimensions:

Products

Stores

Months

with a Sales Measure.

how would I go about designing the data in order to achieve a table with count of new products sold by Store/Agent?

entry.title: Billing document number incorrectly in custom analytical query (S4HANA public cloud)
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have created a custom analytical query to display a lot of sales order related information (sales document, outbound delivery, billing document, production order, inbound delivery etc.).

Everything works as expected, however, the billing document number is displayed in the incorrect row, if a sales order item is rejected. 

In the example below, item 10 has been rejected in the sales order. I checked, and it is not included in the outbound delivery document and not included in the billing document.

In the query, no outbound delivery document is displayed in the row of SO item 10, this is correct. However, the billing document is displayed in the row of SO item 10, but not in the rows of SO item 5 and SO item 15, and this is incorrect. Moroever, the billing document item stated is 5, which is on the incorrect row. The billing document number should be displayed in the same rows as the outbound delivery document number.

I have used CDS I_SalesOrderItemCube as primary source and linked CDS I_BillingDocumentItem with the following fields as Join Condition:

Does anyone know the reason and how I can solve this?

Kind regards,

Floyd

entry.title: Fit the table into a single page in the pdf export SAC
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I created a table with Optimized Design Experience with 15 columns. When I export the table to PDF, it divides the columns into 2 pages. How is it possible to fit the table into a single page, without it being divided into 2 pages? Thank you.

Best regards

entry.title: Incorrect Quantities in custom analytical query
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a query that displays a lot of SD information (sales order, outbound delivery, billing document etc.). However, the query does report the incorrect sales order quantities and outbound delivery quantities. See screenshot below. 

I used the following fields/elements in the query: I_SalesOrderItemCube.OrderQuantity and _I_OutboundDeliveryItem.ActualDeliveryQuantity. 

What is going on here? Can someone offer any help and/or solution?

Kind regards,

 

Floyd

entry.title: Story report issue
entry.content:
Hi all,

we meet an issue at existing Story reports for few days: 

We can run story report, but in each component (table) we cant´t see data but only an error

"An error occurred while fetching the list of members."

Do you know what can be a root of this issue a and how to solve it?

Thanks, Míša

entry.title: Native HANA Information Views on Source system S4/HANA.
entry.content:
Hello,

As per SAP recommendation for S/4 HANA as a Business Suite, for Operational and Analytics reporting, CDS Views is the way to go. CDS views will then be consumed by Fiori apps and Embedded analytics. 

Since we have BW/4HANA in place and all the operational reporting is done there through Native HANA Calculation views, is it feasible to use these models by export import in Source system data base? what are pros and cons of creating HANA Graphical CALC views (information Views) directly on Source system?

What are differences in terms of performance and ease of consuming ABAP CDS views Vs HANA Information Views?

entry.title: SAC - Add Row total to Dimension Subtotal?
entry.content:
I am building a live report for Accounts Receivable. 
The report is based on a live BW model. So i am aware of various limitations this entails. 

With the show totals function I am able to get totals for each client # #based on different aging buckets we have created on SAP backend. The "Aging Buckets" are actually members of a dimension where the measures get aggregated on. (this dimension is located on the columns. 

So the "amount" will be aggregated based on that dimensions "Aging" where the members are the different buckets "current" , "1-30 days" , etc. 

I want to add total for the subtotal row for each customer without adding total for each and every row. This is happening when I activate "show totals" . 

Using formulas isn't a viable solution since the formula will stay linked to a cell. This being a live model, the data will change if filtered on. so the number of rows and columns may change. 

Creating an Aggregation calculation isn't viable either as this becomes a new measure and will duplicate the "Aging" dimensions members and end up looking like 2 tables. 


Summarized: I want total across the highlighted subtotal row for each customer without having totals for each row.

entry.title: Duplicate rows appear in the story report.
entry.content:
Hi community, 

Recently, I have been making a LMS Story Report at the request of the HR manager.

I imported "SF_LMS_Class_Management_v1.0" from content store, and I noticed the table on the Class Details page strange. 

There are many rows in the table, but there are many duplicate rows. What's wrong with this table? How can I make the same row visible only once?

If you know a solution, please explain it to me.

entry.title: The data sometimes comes out weird in the Story Report.
entry.content:
Hi community,

Recently, I have been making a LMS Story Report at the request of the HR manager.

I imported "SF_LMS_Class_Management_v1.0" from content store, and I sometimes find that the data looks weird.

As you can see in the attached picture below, the name of the lecture is shown as title. Item.~~~.
And when I press the title, it goes to the Class Detail page, but the data does not appear on that page either.

What's wrong with this chart? How can I get the name of the lecture to be exposed normally?

entry.title: What is the difference between "max registration" and "maximum class registration in story report?
entry.content:
Hi community,

Recently, I have been making a LMS Story Report at the request of the HR manager.

I imported "SF_LMS_Class_Management_v1.0" from content store, and I found that "class capacity" column in "Registration & Capacity" page is wierd.

 

So I checked the calculation of "Class Capacity" and the basic settings ar as shown in the screenshot below.

There is a value "Maximum Class registration" in the formula, so I added it to the table to make it easier to compare.

 But I'm not sure what the difference is between "Maximum Class Registration" and "Max Registration".

Can you explain to me what is the difference between the two values?

entry.title: ad-hoc analysis on BW Querys in SAP Analytics Cloud on iOS mobile devices
entry.content:
We have SAC on live data connections to our BW/4 Business Warehouse, and we use the SAP mobile app on devices to access SAC stories and applications.

Is there any way to perform an ad-hoc analysis on BW Queries on iOS mobile devices also, say using the data analyzer?
